summary: Full backend (10/10 pytest passed) + frontend e2e testing of GestionCardex (auth + avocats CRUD). All critical flows working.

minor.issue: After logout, set_cookie deletion is correct (Set-Cookie header sent), but server-side does not invalidate JWT. Acceptable given httpOnly cookie clearance; consider token blacklist for stricter security.

issues: Clean modern professional layout. Sidebar nav ('Tableau de bord', 'Avocats', 'Déconnexion') and stat cards (TOTAL AVOCATS, ACTIFS, INACTIFS, MÉGA) render correctly. Toast confirmation 'Avocat supprimé' visible after delete.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.110).
JWT_SECRET hardcoded value present in /app/backend/.env — acceptable for dev, ensure rotated in production.
Cookie 'secure=False' is set explicitly; in production behind HTTPS this should be True. Recommend driving via env (COOKIE_SECURE).
CORS allow_origins includes hardcoded 'http://localhost:3000' alongside FRONTEND_URL env — acceptable for dev.
No rate limiting / brute force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook recommends lockout after 5 fails). Not blocking but recommended.
server.py is ~360 lines — fine, but if features grow split into routers/auth.py, routers/avocats.py.
seed_data_creation: Tests use UUID-prefixed codes (T..., S...) and UI002, all cleaned up via teardown fixture / explicit DELETE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard route is '/' (not '/dashboard'). Login redirects to '/'. data-testid pattern: login-{email-input,password-input,submit-button}, add-avocat-button, avocat-search-input, avocat-status-filter, avocats-table, edit-avocat-{code}, delete-avocat-{code}, avocat-input-{code,nom,prenom}, avocat-submit, avocat-cancel, logout-button. Backend pytest file: /app/backend/tests/test_gestioncardex.py.
